title: Charred, Glassy-Jelly Polish Pistachio Bowl
description: Indulgent Polish dish featuring pistachio paste, clay-pot-cooked in an earthenware bowl.
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together the pistachio paste, raw sugar, and cornstarch.
In a medium saucepan, whisk together the unsweetened almond milk, maple syrup, and lemon juice.
Add the pistachio mixture to the saucepan and whisk until smooth.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and comes to a boil.
Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract and sea salt.
Add the unsalted vegan butter and whisk until melted.
Pour the mixture into the prepared earthenware bowl and smooth the top.
Cover the bowl with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the jelly has set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves, if desired.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Refrigerate or freeze for later use.
